untranslatable_reason: The Broadening Bottom pattern requires detection of two specific peaks and two specific valleys with precise spatial relationships (U-shaped volume bow pattern, receding volume on decline, rising volume on advance). This multi-bar pattern recognition and volume trend analysis cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and operators. Pattern detection requires either: (1) explicit peak/trough detection logic, (2) multi-bar sequence matching, or (3) local extrema identification—none of which are supported by the available indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted minimal translation using volume confirmation as entry filter and SMA-20 as basic exit, but this does not capture the core pattern logic. The signal critically depends on identifying formation structure (peaks/valleys) and volume divergence patterns that require bar-by-bar analysis unavailable in the allowed indicators.
